Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class JavaInfo

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaInfo
public final class JavaInfo extends Object
an instance serves as representation of a Java model underlying a DL formula. This class provides calls to access the elements of the Java model using the KeY data structures only. Implementation specific details like the use of Recoder is hidden in the field of type KeYProgModelInfo. This class can be extended to provide further services.

  • Method Details

    • getKeYProgModelInfo

      public KeYProgModelInfo getKeYProgModelInfo()
      returns the underlying KeYProgModelInfo providing access to the Recoder structures.

    • rec2key

      public KeYRecoderMapping rec2key()
      convenience method that returns the Recoder-to-KeY mapping underlying the KeYProgModelInfo of this JavaInfo

    • copy

      public JavaInfo copy(Services serv)
      copies this JavaInfo and uses the given Services object as the Services object of the copied JavaInfo
      Parameters:
      serv - the Services the copy will use and vice versa
      Returns:
      a copy of the JavaInfo

    • getServices

      public Services getServices()
      returns the services associated with this JavaInfo

    • getFullName

      public String getFullName(KeYJavaType t)
      returns the full name of a given KeYJavaType.
      Parameters:
      t - the KeYJavaType including the package prefix
      Returns:
      the full name

    • createTypeReference

      public TypeReference createTypeReference(KeYJavaType kjt)
      creates a new TypeReference for the given KeYJavaType

    • resetCaches

      public void resetCaches()

    • getTypeByName

      public KeYJavaType getTypeByName(String fullName)
      looks up the fully qualifying name given by a String in the list of all available KeYJavaTypes in the Java model
      Parameters:
      fullName - the String
      Returns:
      the KeYJavaType with the name of the String

    • isPackage

      public boolean isPackage(String name)
      checks if name refers to a package
      Parameters:
      name - a String with the name to be checked
      Returns:
      true iff name refers to a package

    • getTypeByClassName

      public KeYJavaType getTypeByClassName(String className)
      looks up a KeYJavaType with given name. If the name is a fully qualifying name with package prefix an element with this full name is taken. In case of an unqualified name to which no type is found in the default package, the type is looked for in package cjava.lang
      Parameters:
      className - the fully qualified class name (or an unqualified name from package java.lang)
      Returns:
      a class matching the name

    • getTypeDeclaration

      public TypeDeclaration getTypeDeclaration(String fullName)
      returns a type declaration with the full name of the given String fullName

      public Set<KeYJavaType> getAllKeYJavaTypes()
      returns all known KeYJavaTypes of the current program type model
      Returns:
      all known KeYJavaTypes of the current program type model

      returns a primitive KeYJavaType matching the given typename.

      public KeYJavaType getKeYJavaType(String fullName)
      returns a KeYJavaType (either primitive of object type) having the full name of the given String fullName
      Parameters:
      fullName - a String with the type name to lookup

    • getConstructors

      public ImmutableList<IProgramMethod> getConstructors(KeYJavaType kjt)

    • getConstructor

      public IProgramMethod getConstructor(KeYJavaType kjt, ImmutableList<KeYJavaType> signature)

    • getProgramMethod

      public IProgramMethod getProgramMethod(KeYJavaType classType, String methodName, ImmutableList<? extends Type> signature, KeYJavaType context)
      returns the program methods defined in the given KeYJavaType with name m and the list of types as signature of the method
      Parameters:
      classType - the KeYJavaType of the class where to look for the method
      methodName - the name of the method
      signature - a IList with the arguments types
      context - the KeYJavaType of the class context from where the method is called
      Returns:
      a matching program method

    • getProgramMethod

      public IProgramMethod getProgramMethod(KeYJavaType classType, String methodName, ImmutableArray<? extends Type> signature, KeYJavaType context)

    • getProgramMethod

      public IProgramMethod getProgramMethod(KeYJavaType classType, String methodName, List<List<KeYJavaType>> signature, KeYJavaType context)

    • getProgramMethod

      public IProgramMethod getProgramMethod(KeYJavaType classType, String methodName, ProgramVariable[] args, KeYJavaType context)
      returns the program method defined in the KeYJavaType of the program variable clv, with the name m, and the KeYJavaTypes of the given array of program variables as signatures.
      Parameters:
      classType - the KeYJavaType of the class where to look for the method
      methodName - the name of the method
      args - an array of ProgramVariables as the arguments of the method
      context - the KeYJavaType of the class context from where the method is called
      Returns:
      a matching program method

    • getToplevelPM

      public IProgramMethod getToplevelPM(KeYJavaType kjt, String methodName, ImmutableList<KeYJavaType> sig)

    • getToplevelPM

      public IProgramMethod getToplevelPM(KeYJavaType kjt, IProgramMethod pm)

      public Term getTermFromProgramMethod(IProgramMethod pm, String methodName, String className, Term[] args, Term prefix) throws IllegalArgumentException

      IllegalArgumentException

    • getDirectSuperTypes

      public ImmutableList<KeYJavaType> getDirectSuperTypes(KeYJavaType type)
      returns all direct supertypes (local declared types in extends and implements) if extends is not given explict java.lang.Object is added (it is not added for interfaces)

    • getSuperclass

      public KeYJavaType getSuperclass(KeYJavaType type)
      retrieves the direct extended superclass for the given class
      Parameters:
      type - the KeYJavaType of the type whose superclass has to be determined
      Returns:
      KeYJavaType of the extended supertype

    • createSignature

      public ImmutableList<KeYJavaType> createSignature(ImmutableArray<? extends Expression> arguments)
      retrieves the signature according to the given expressions
      Parameters:
      arguments - ArrayOf of which we try to construct a signature
      Returns:
      the signature

    • getAllFields

      public ImmutableList<Field> getAllFields(TypeDeclaration classDecl)
      retrieves all attributes locally declared in class cl (inclusive the implicit attributes) The returned list is in source code order.
      Parameters:
      classDecl - the ClassDeclaration whose attributes shall be collected
      Returns:
      all attributes declared in class cl

    • getImplicitFields

      public ImmutableList<Field> getImplicitFields(ClassDeclaration cl)
      retrieves all implicit attributes locally declared in the given class The returned list is in source code order.
      Parameters:
      cl - the ClassDeclaration where to look for the implicit attributes
      Returns:
      all implicit attributes declared in cl

    • readJavaBlock

      public JavaBlock readJavaBlock(String java, TypeDeclaration asIn)
      reads a Java block given as a string java as it was in the given TypeDeclaration asIn.

    • readJavaBlock

      public JavaBlock readJavaBlock(String java)
      reads a Java block given as a String

    • readJava

      public ProgramElement readJava(String java)
      reads a Java statement not necessarily a block

    • getAttribute

      public ProgramVariable getAttribute(String fullyQualifiedName)
      returns the programvariable for the specified attribute. The attribute has to be fully qualified, i.e. declarationType::attributeName
      Parameters:
      fullyQualifiedName - the String with the fully qualified attribute name
      Returns:
      an attribute program variable of the given name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given name is not fully qualified

    • getAttribute

      public ProgramVariable getAttribute(String programName, String qualifiedClassName)
      returns the programvariable for the specified attribute declared in the specified class
      Parameters:
      programName - the String with the name of the attribute
      qualifiedClassName - the String with the full (inclusive package) qualified class name
      Returns:
      the attribute program variable of the given name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the qualified class name is empty or null
      UnknownJavaTypeException - if the qualified name refers to an unknown type

    • getAttribute

      public ProgramVariable getAttribute(String name, KeYJavaType classType)
      returns the program variable representing the attribute of the given name declared locally in class classType
      Parameters:
      name - String containing the name of the attribute
      classType - the KeYJavaType representing the class where to look for the attribute
      Returns:
      the attribute of the given name declared in classType

    • getAttribute

      public ProgramVariable getAttribute(String attributeName, Sort s)
      returns an attribute named attributeName declared locally in object type s
      Parameters:
      attributeName - the String containing the name of the field
      s - the Sort of the reference type to be queried for the field
      Returns:
      the ProgramVariable representing the field of name attributeName in type s

    • getCanonicalFieldProgramVariable

      public ProgramVariable getCanonicalFieldProgramVariable(String fieldName, KeYJavaType kjt)

    • getAllAttributes

      public ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> getAllAttributes(String programName, KeYJavaType type)

    • getAllAttributes

      public ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> getAllAttributes(String programName, KeYJavaType type, boolean traverseSubtypes)
      returns a list of all attributes with the given program name declared in one of type's sub- or supertype including its own attributes Attention: The type must not denote the null type
      Parameters:
      programName - the String with name of the attribute as declared in a program
      type - the KeYJavaType specifying the part of the hierarchy where to look for
      traverseSubtypes - The method will visit subtypes of type while traversing its type hierarchy iff this is set to true. Otherwise only supertypes will be visited.
      Returns:
      list of found attributes with name programName

    • getJavaLangObject

      public KeYJavaType getJavaLangObject()
      returns the KeYJavaType for class java.lang.Object

    • getJavaLangCloneable

      public KeYJavaType getJavaLangCloneable()
      returns the KeYJavaType for class java.lang.Clonable

    • getJavaIoSerializable

      public KeYJavaType getJavaIoSerializable()
      returns the KeYJavaType for class java.io.Serializable

    • objectSort

      public Sort objectSort()
      returns the KeYJavaType for class java.lang.Object

    • cloneableSort

      public Sort cloneableSort()
      returns the KeYJavaType for class java.lang.Cloneable

    • serializableSort

      public Sort serializableSort()
      returns the KeYJavaType for class java.io.Serializable

    • nullSort

      public Sort nullSort()

    • isAJavaCommonSort

      public boolean isAJavaCommonSort(Sort sort)
      tests if sort represents java.lang.Object, java.lang.Cloneable or java.io.Serializable

    • getNullType

      public KeYJavaType getNullType()
      returns the KeYJavaType representing the type of 'null'

    • getDefaultExecutionContext

      public ExecutionContext getDefaultExecutionContext()
      returns the default execution context. This is equiavlent to executing the program in a static method of a class placed in the default package
      Returns:
      the default execution context

    • getAllSubtypes

      public ImmutableList<KeYJavaType> getAllSubtypes(KeYJavaType type)
      returns all proper subtypes of a given type
      Parameters:
      type - the KeYJavaType whose subtypes are returned
      Returns:
      list of all subtypes

    • getAllSupertypes

      public ImmutableList<KeYJavaType> getAllSupertypes(KeYJavaType type)
      returns all supertypes of a given type
      Parameters:
      type - the KeYJavaType whose supertypes are returned
      Returns:
      list of all supertypes

    • lookupVisibleAttribute

      public ProgramVariable lookupVisibleAttribute(String programName, KeYJavaType classType)
      looks up for a field of the given program name visible in the specified class type belonging to the type or one of its supertypes
      Parameters:
      programName - the String containing the name of the field to be looked up. The name is in short notation, i.e. not fully qualified
      classType - the KeYJavaType of the class used as context
      Returns:
      the field of the given name

    • getCommonSubtypes

      public ImmutableList<KeYJavaType> getCommonSubtypes(KeYJavaType k1, KeYJavaType k2)
      returns the list of all common subtypes of types k1 and k2 (inclusive one of them if they are equal or subtypes themselves) attention: Null is not a jav atype only a logic sort, i.e. if null is the only element shared between k1 and k2 the returned list will be empty
      Parameters:
      k1 - the first KeYJavaType denoting a class type
      k2 - the second KeYJavaType denoting a classtype
      Returns:
      the list of common subtypes of types k1 and k2

    • getArrayLength

      public ProgramVariable getArrayLength()
      returns the length attribute for arrays

    • getInv

      public IObserverFunction getInv()
      Returns the special symbol <inv> which stands for the class invariant of an object.
      See Also:
      • getInvProgramVar()

    • getInvProgramVar

      public ProgramVariable getInvProgramVar()
      Returns the special program variable symbol <inv> which stands for the class invariant of an object.
      See Also:
      • getInv()

    • getInvFree

      public IObserverFunction getInvFree()
      Returns the special symbol <inv_free> which stands for the free class invariant of an object.
      See Also:
      • getInvProgramVar()

    • getFreeInvProgramVar

      public ProgramVariable getFreeInvProgramVar()
      Returns the special program variable symbol <inv_free> which stands for the free class invariant of an object.
      See Also:
      • #getFreeInv()

    • getStaticInv

      public IObserverFunction getStaticInv(KeYJavaType target)
      Returns the special symbol <$inv> which stands for the static invariant of a type.

    • getStaticInvFree

      public IObserverFunction getStaticInvFree(KeYJavaType target)
      Returns the special symbol &lt$inv_free> which stands for the static invariant of a type.

    • isCanonicalProgramMethod

      public boolean isCanonicalProgramMethod(IProgramMethod method, KeYJavaType context) throws NullPointerException
      This is used for pretty printing observer terms.
      Parameters:
      method - the program method.
      context - the KeYJavaType.
      Returns:
      whether the program method is canonical.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - e.g., if the receiver of the observer happens to be replaced by "null".

    • getTypeByClassName

      public KeYJavaType getTypeByClassName(String name, KeYJavaType containerType)
      retrieves the KeYJavaType of the given type name. If the type is not fully qualified, it is looked for in the context of the containerType first and then in the java.lang package.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the type (if possible fully qualified)
      containerType - the KeYJavaType of the context in which the type should be resolved
      Returns:
      the KeYJavaType of the given type or null if type name is unknown
